assembly_metadata.label: SYNTHETIC FIXTURE OUTPUT - NOT FOR APPLICATION USE

resume_strategy: Position as an AI Product Manager with verified product outcomes, role-relevant evidence, and Product OS proof used only as supporting context.

selected_headline.text: AI Product Manager | AI Workflows, Product Strategy & Platform Readiness

selected_summary.text: Product leader focused on AI Product Manager roles, with evidence across AI/ML, Model evaluation, AI workflows, Responsible AI. Selected proof points include LOG-MRR-002, LOG-THR-005, LOG-ARR-001. This draft uses Product OS as a supporting proof layer while preserving employer experience, metrics, and interview-defensible claims.

bullets.text: Directed AI/ML-powered personalization in product discovery, contributing to +25% engagement and +20% MRR growth while building AI roadmap readiness.
Led platform architecture and DevOps maturity work that improved throughput by 15% and made future AI capabilities more scalable.
Owned zero-to-one platform product strategy that generated Rs. 1M+ ARR, creating commercial context for AI-enabled product expansion.
Aligned cross-functional teams around roadmap governance, tripling delivery velocity and creating operating discipline for AI-ready execution.
Partnered with engineering and data science to evaluate ML personalization models and convert behavioral insights into product requirements.
Used behavioral data to re-architect discovery and personalization logic, improving session duration by 40% and strengthening workflow adoption.
Grew Biopharma portfolio revenue 30% through customer-driven pricing, packaging, and portfolio strategy.
Improved delivery economics by reducing development cost 25% and increasing time-to-market speed 15%.
Scaled the Job Guarantee portfolio from Rs. 1M to Rs. 10M by redesigning pricing, packaging, and go-to-market alignment.

gaps.current_evidence: AI product judgment, ML personalization, AI prioritization, and AI readiness evidence.
gaps.resume_mitigation: Use AI product and prioritization evidence without claiming unsupported GenAI production ownership.
gaps.product_os_mitigation: Use AI Product Playbook or AI Prioritization Framework as proof of thinking.
gaps.interview_mitigation: Explain AI product decision quality and boundaries clearly.
